title: PR Trajectory v0
description: Initial JSON schema for a software-engineering trajectory extracted from a public GitHub PR. This is schema v0 (not final). See GitHub issue #2.

id.description: Stable identifier for this trajectory record (e.g. repo-pr-123 or hash).

pr_number.description: Pull request number within the repo.

source_urls.description: Links to the PR, issue, and/or specific review threads that contributed signal.

language.description: Primary programming language of the change (e.g. Rust, Python, Julia).

domain.description: Application domain (e.g. ML-infra, systems, data-pipeline, web).

task_type.description: High-level classification of the engineering task.

issue_context.description: Summary of the originating issue or motivation (public text only).

review_signals.description: Key review comments or suggestions that drove changes.

description: Key review comments or suggestions that drove changes.

before_context.description: Relevant code/state before the patch (snippets or file references).

patch.description: Unified diff or structured patch representing the fix/implementation.

validation.description: Validation events (CI runs, test results, manual verification) after the change.

description: Validation events (CI runs, test results, manual verification) after the change.

training_use.description: Intended primary training signal this trajectory provides.

quality_score.description: Optional human or heuristic quality score for filtering (0-1).
